tasks.title: Backend Infrastructure: RPC Compatibility and Data Structures
tasks.description: Prepare the Go backend to handle the new network protocol and data structures for VAR and SKA tokens. Ensure the explorer can communicate with the updated node RPC [1-3].

tasks.title: Implement RPC Compatibility for New Network
tasks.description: Update the Go code in the rpcutils and dcrdata packages to handle the new RPC protocol and network properties, ensuring all block and transaction structures are compatible [1, 2, 4].

tasks.title: Define Go Structures for 13-Column Table
tasks.description: Define internal Go structures in dbtypes and explorer/types to support the 13 columns required for the main page: Overview (7), VAR (3), and SKA (3) [5, 6].

tasks.title: Develop Mock Data Provider
tasks.description: Create a mock data provider that returns hardcoded block data with VAR and SKA tokens to allow frontend development while the database sync is in progress [3].

tasks.title: Main Page UI: Block List Table Update
tasks.description: Update the main page block list to display 13 columns across three sections: Overview, VAR, and SKA. Ensure the layout remains responsive [5, 7, 8].

tasks.title: Modify Templates for 13-Column Layout
tasks.description: Update home.tmpl and related view files to include the 13 required columns. Group them under visual headers or color-coded sections for Overview, VAR, and SKA [6].

tasks.title: Implement SKA Precision Logic
tasks.description: Configure the template logic to display SKA coin amounts with a maximum of 2 decimal places on the main page for space optimization [8].

tasks.title: Interactive SKA Details (Accordion)
tasks.description: Implement an interactive accordion that expands when clicking SKA numbers to show a breakdown of individual SKA token types (SKA1, SKA2, etc.) [9-12].

tasks.title: Develop Stimulus Controller for SKA Expansion
tasks.description: Create a Stimulus controller to handle click events on SKA Transactions, Sum, or Size cells. Manage row visibility and toggle icons [11, 13, 14].

tasks.title: Implement Turbo Streams for Dynamic Loading
tasks.description: Set up a backend endpoint and frontend handling to 'push' additional rows containing SKA1/SKA2 details into the DOM using Turbo Streams when the row is expanded [15, 16].

tasks.title: Style Expanded Detail Rows
tasks.description: Add CSS for expanded rows to distinguish them from primary blocks (e.g., different fonts, indentation, and removing block height numbers) [17].

tasks.title: Global UI Enhancements and Clean-up
tasks.description: Update secondary widgets and cleanup unused UI components as per Monetarium requirements [18, 19].

tasks.title: Update Coin Supply Widget
tasks.description: Rename 'Distribution' to 'Coin Supply'. Add VAR circulation percentage and detailed SKA supply info (Issued, Withdrawn, Circulating) [18, 19].

tasks.title: Hide Placeholder Sections
tasks.description: Temporarily hide the Treasury and Exchange Rate sections on the main page as they are not currently implemented [18].

tasks.title: Add SKA Indicators to Mempool
tasks.description: Update the Mempool table to show SKA transactions with colored bracket indicators for different SKA types [19, 20].
